HomeInsights

Here's how to get government grants into your RESP

At a glance:
  • The CESG matches 20% of your RESP contributions, up to $500 per year.
  • Unused CESG grant room can be carried forward, up to $1,000 per year.

There are plenty of good reasons to use a Registered Education Savings Plan (RESP).

Many RESP holders have questions about how to get that grant into an account.

Your advisor can take care of the details.

If you're working with an advisor, they will handle the details of applying for the CESG.

DIY investors must do it themselves.

If you are managing the RESP yourself, you will have to apply for the grant yourself.

Share on social media
